title: Google Maps Company Scraper
description: Scrapes company data from Google Maps. The actor automatically builds a natural-language query like 'AI companies in Bangalore with 500 to 1000 employees' from your inputs.

searchQuery.title: Custom Search Query (Optional)
searchQuery.description: Override the auto-built query with your own text. If left empty, the actor builds the query from Industry Filter + Location + Employee range (e.g. 'AI companies in Bangalore with 500 to 1000 employees').

location.title: Location
location.description: Geographic area to focus the search on. Used in the auto-built query.

industryFilter.title: Industry / Company Type
industryFilter.description: Type of companies to search for. Used to build the query (e.g. 'AI' → 'AI companies in Bangalore...').

minEmployees.title: Minimum Employee Size
minEmployees.description: Appended to the search query as 'with N+ employees' or 'with N to M employees'. Set to 0 to omit.

maxEmployees.title: Maximum Employee Size (Optional)
maxEmployees.description: Combined with Minimum to produce 'with 500 to 1000 employees' in the query. Leave empty for no upper bound.

numResults.title: Number of Results
numResults.description: How many companies to extract. Maximum is 500.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Strongly recommended for avoiding rate limits on large runs.
